name: Savory Zucchini Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the biscuit mix, onion, salt, seasoned salt, oregano, Parmesan cheese, red pepper or tabasco, parsley, and garlic.
2. Add the vegetable oil and eggs to the mixture. Stir until well combined.
3. Fold in the zucchini slices, making sure they are evenly distributed throughout the batter.
4. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the bread comes out clean.
7. Turn off the oven and let the bread cool in the pan for about 10 minutes before removing it from the pan.
